h1aa3a1beg17bag4940ga433g1b7f0258fedf: A cheap shot. I should've expected that.
h1d5d35e8g4c33g4b3bg8044g51d9561f837f: I'll survive a sore jaw. Particularly if it's rid the grove of Aradin.
h25710e93g77dag461bga007gb46265c3987b: True to form, and good riddance. This grove has troubles enough.
h7a7d83e8gcd01g4d6cg9409g5005de378d8e: Did I now? It makes no matter - this grove has problems enough.
h4d19dbcfg0652g4950gbfeegccf678d00272: Indeed - I'll survive a sore jaw. This grove has bigger problems right now.
h1a58b588ga301g4c19g93bcg60637c81ef04: What I didn't expect was help out there from a drow. Thank you - I'm Zevlor.
h57b77e8fg2e54g4503gbb82g39047ede9b96: A cheap shot - to be expected from a drow. But you helped us, so instead of killing you I'll just ask:
he2af0291gde0cg42f0gbd55gd9d6686f8e66: I'd ask who you are, but I've heard of the Blade of Frontiers. I'd heard he was a hero, though - not a thug.
h3ddbc451g80e5g4134ga544gd29a61d15384: Who in the Nine Hells do you think you are?
hc4666288gbd76g4effga765gfd794b049360: You were heading for bloodshed. I avoided that.
hb40a55c4gb5d6g44eegbf5cg5432422d6a43: Very noble of you. Now unless you plan on striking me again, I have other problems to attend to.
hadf40b5fg68d5g4c6fgb06bg3267408eed42: This place is in enough turmoil. It will be smart for both of us to make allies of enemies.
h2c9a1e26g3262g4e49gb351geea450318624: Whatever your business, I'd see to it quickly - the druids are forcing everyone out.
he6a84a3cg6f93g4e5cga112g5e0d9bcf2dbf: This attack will only strengthen their resolve.
hb5410355ga5a2g429dga3e6gdcea2ed3a8ed: I have no quarrel with druids.
hf941a647g39f8g4b2aga1aag5aaaba26675d: There have been several attacks by different monsters. The druids blame us 'outsiders' for drawing them here. Nobody's welcome anymore.
h573bbaa6gc52eg4adag9745gd33efdc5e018: They've started a ritual to cut the grove off from the world outside.
hc0f7e4cega180g4c0bgbb4bg8aa0c49e95b7: We can't stay, but we'll be slaughtered if we leave - we're no fighters.
he682157agf9bcg46cbg8733g89d19efdb2cd: This ritual - is there no way to convince the druids to stop it?
h80347339g081bg4f63ga014gd7e93375e5fd: I've tried. Kagha - their new First Druid - won't even see me.
hb5ece63fgb0ebg4d17g846fgf4c6fba66f7d: You, though... I know it's not your business, but she owes you for saving this place.
h8a549adbg7afbg44b4gb402g1b3ad1d93227: Perhaps you could persuade her. For more time to prepare, if nothing else.
h42bfc64dg067ag4288ga0c0g6edac5295949: I'll see what I can do.
hda56c77ag9bd3g430dgacb1g926059e58828: We'd owe you a great debt. If we're forced to leave now, we won't make it to the city.
hb54001e9g6cf1g4a27g8358g5c37f5489020: You'll find the druids at the heart of the grove. Please - make them see sense.
hb7c669f0g2b68g48feg8e34gafed87ba2322: Oh, and if it's of any concern... You're brave to walk around without hiding your heritage. I'll make sure everyone knows that you helped us at the gate.
h7eaf08c9g5cbeg4a7fga0a4g5927f4ba7db8: You'll find the druids at the heart of the grove. Please - make them see sense, before more lives are lost.
ha1fde936g4536g4451gae7egee84a2e629e7: Kagha's a piece of work. Let's see if your wit surpasses your might.
h88042dbbg22bag4b9cgbda5gff907d53797c: I think you should, yes. No harm in trying the diplomatic route.
he4188183ga379g49cdg82b3g527cc6697245: Let's not forget why we're here. No point in wasting precious time on a lost cause.
hffcd0656g9ae5g4414g97d9g7f70e5530df2: |Here is what I think of you agreeing to talk to Kagha.|
h4128d4fbgade4g4571ga657g95fc546e5725: |Here is what I think of you agreeing to talk to Kagha.|
hb0055fa2g9519g4ac9gb8bcg7a5ae8973ab7: |Here is what I think of you agreeing to talk to Kagha.|
hb8e6bfdeg7157g4b1agabc4g522a7b59ed25: Bah. We've no time to offer aid to every whimpering pup.
hca9ba578g8065g422dg8b92ge3349bda5a14: I'm sorry. I've got my own problems.
h2f51d009g8888g4777g990bg2da29e1c78d2: Turning your back on the needy to save your own skin? Maybe we'll get along after all.
h8675c263g5ae8g4b96gb94bgebe9d0fc39ea: I understand. I can only thank you for the help you've already given.
hb4f10aedg534cg47b2ga4b7ge95eb3b8a9a9: We're raised to fear the drow, but you've earned your place here. I'll make sure everyone here knows that.
hcd293878g5e1fg4a94g9ee7g9ed5c2219bc8: Just keep your fists to yourself, yes?
h066bf558ge6abg4a4eg9321g4c16195a5b8c: If you'll excuse me - I'd best get my people moving.
h7f403eb2gebb7g4dfdgaa85gbfdff5157c45: These poor souls seek a champion - and you turn your back?
h756e1b3egb415g48c5gadacgb5f17355c01d: We've our problems, granted, but there might be some merit in shutting down a local conflict, no?
hb95897cagce14g446eg8496ga032b796c3bb: You chose well. We have enough burdens as it is without taking on more.
h20d9b6ccg5e52g4c04ga4a2gea181767a798: |Reflect on player refusing to get involved and speak to Kagha|
hffa049e0gd7bcg4e5bg9e70g922c66bacca6: |Reflect on player refusing to get involved and speak to Kagha|
h1ddbf683g26beg44adg9968gff1c745dca8d: |Reflect on player refusing to get involved and speak to Kagha|
h32458cfagb699g4f32g894dg34527330885c: A rational choice. We mustn't stray from our path.
hf73e47e7g6489g4415gb43bga59f335ab2f2: I have my own time concerns. I need a healer.
heaff6c23g3680g4dedgaa7eg68f36ea6bf42: You're wounded? The druid Halsin's a renowned healer, but he went with those adventurers. It seems they left him behind.
h14c55e9fgf237g41aagb18bg3d3ea3bad8c9: If it's not too serious, you could try his apprentice Nettie. She's with the other druids, in the inner grove.
h98723c8dgcca4g40f7gaa4cgbdd526ae0de4: They've withdrawn there to prepare this damn ritual of theirs.
hf668069ag7649g4396gb525gb48cb1fc9dfb: I'll find her. And I'll speak to Kagha while I'm there.
hdefc3892gdf10g40f1g8971gfbb5868b41e9: Enough about the ritual. I have my own problems.
h16dadc22g6eeeg460dga480g0a12aad85b1c: Goblin got you? The druid Halsin's a renowned healer, but he didn't make it back from Aradin's expedition.
h67b392b3ge492g4ecbgb0f2g9946c168299f: What are you offering for my aid?
hcb0610bbg23cdg4621ga039ga99f4641743f: We'd owe you a great debt. What little we have, we'll scrape together. It isn't coin we need - it's time.
h922533e8g34e2g46d5g885bg66d63e6e118f: We're refugees from Elturel - we took shelter here after gnolls attacked us on the road.
hff1d7b6ag12a3g4d03gadc9g66ac7bc7d733: We were bound for Baldur's Gate, and it was too late to turn back. Elturel had no place for tieflings after the Descent.
hb6021aa7g8178g48c3g8bafge1bf82e2072f: I'm surprised you haven't heard of it.
hce5cde4agdf64g424cgba95gb6a0b2ed4b0a: The High Overseer - our grand protector- signed a pact with devils. It dragged Elturel straight to hell.
hb05c1f18g1fe4g44e8g8fbcgd14aa53b3042: Lucky for us a group of adventurers found a way to bring the city back.
h214cdb27g4a23g4208g8ddagdfed6344d172: Afterwards, people looked at us and just saw 'devil-kin'. No different from the druids here, really.
h7c41bb81g7aa6g4153g8feag5b61d1a9d42f: *'The Descent' - an infernal conspiracy that had seen the entire city of Elturel briefly dragged to the Hells.*
he37e1670ge988g435fgb08eg799fe78cf623: If your people survived that, they'll survive anything.
hd5233665ge5d5g4eccgb44eg64c94b693bdd: So I hoped. But we've lost so many already - and more will die if we're forced out again.
hfc8f26fdgf139g4aacg8195gdbc2c8d3be52: Is there a place for tieflings anywhere?
h82c64b5egf6eeg4cbbg98e5g5737043ce58b: Hah - a fair point. We can only hope the citizens of Baldur's Gate are more open-minded.
h001302a0gac0fg48ecg8d7cg9dc85e6ed90c: But we can't get there with those beasts blocking our path.
h97ae073dg1e78g41f5gae73g05c73f1276a1: Maybe your people should have stayed in Hell.
hcd15897fg0039g48d5g8d4cg8421dfffd78c: It seems you're of a mind with our hosts here. But their ritual will force you out, too.
hc8c2c5c4g55b3g4b21gbdc4gcbfae62f8504: Thank you again for your help out there.
heb2e924dg0ed5g4197g9256g45ef28229450: Why are they forcing you out?
h3fa64d52gef1eg489cg9d78g7fa91542afc6: Those goblins - have there been many attacks like that?
hd24f6a8bg81ceg4359ga672g25abbe5f3c43: I won't be staying long - I just need to find a healer.
h0925b1b8gb16ag4764g8e2agf1a6371495e7: Zevlor. Now unless you plan on striking me again, I have other problems to attend to.
hbf01b917gead2g4543gbafcgd4df7e29f980: I'll survive a sore jaw. What I won't tolerate is a stranger waltzing in here and interfering in our business.
h3f19b8eegf8c2g4b60gb0b9ged562229cb79: Lucky for you, you seem to have spooked that adventurer trash into leaving.
hfffeed9agff55g406dg8c2eg8e3df981616b: I can see that. You're lucky your little display scared him off.
h81e3e125gddd4g4754g86c4g3ecf4b89647e: Lay hands on me again, however, and every tiefling in this encampment will fall on you like a tide.
h64552e04g2aaeg467bg9536gfcffdde6f946: And so will you, if you ever lay hands on me again. That I promise you.
h99eba437gca5ag41e1gabe8ga77670f7915a: You acted quickly. I'm just sorry I didn't get there first.
h87de96f7g78afg4148g9a98g90fffeb4a618: Aradin didn't make it? Pity - but he might've got more of my people killed, if not for you.
h65d7fcc8g805cg4c87g80d8gcd8826525590: Forgive that display. Aradin's a blowhard, but that's no cause for me to join him.
h6a34ac09g23e8g455dgbde8g94544fd2bff8: Thank you for your help out there. I'm Zevlor.
hadbaee0ag06fbg4706ga162gdd8c59f7072c: And if I'm not mistaken, you're the Blade of Frontiers.
h5f353193g4739g4234g92d1gf438decd9758: Well met, by whatever name. Though I'm afraid that's all the welcome we can give you.
h2113aa0eg81e9g4b86g87b7g3df3f3051c70: A druid's grove, dedicated to the Oak Father Silvanus. You'll find its keepers just as thorny, I fear.
h1c52937fgfab4g437agb4d0gf9b43394c829: I take my thanks in coin.
h32df1d6cg44cag4798g9bc8gb61f6a321fe9: Then you'll have better luck looting the goblins outside - this is a druid's grove.
he91fe379g01ecg4bb7gb7f4gefcfcb35c529: I wouldn't have looked to a drow for help, but I'm grateful all the same. I'm Zevlor.
h8e5b3c0ega970g41a3gb9a3ge2686a980e59: Well met. I should warn you - visitors are no longer welcome in this grove.
h98091f45g49dbg456dga6d4g37e109781e8b: Do you have something against drow?
hbb820982g5d1dg4b55gb18cg2dd6386dd629: I meant no insult. It's simply that yours are a people at war with themselves - I've never known them to care for outsiders.
